creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Neel Chauhan from comment #2)
Could you place following lines to /boot/loader.conf and than post psm-related part of boot log here?
------CUT-------
hw.psm.synaptics_support=1
hw.psm.elantech_support=1
hw.psm.trackpoint_support=1
debug.psm.loglevel=5
------CUT-------

P.S. You can obtain boot log with dmesg command or in /var/log/messages file right after boot
